executor_steps: In the COM annex, replace 'eq Mode: int = 0;' with 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);'
In the COM annex, replace 'not Fail => CMD = Pedal;' with 'not FailCOM1 => COM1.CMD = Pedal;'
In the MON annex, replace 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);' with 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);'
In the MON annex, replace 'not Fail => (Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal));' with 'not FailMON1 => (MON1.Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal));'

In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'assign Initializing = not (COM1_Running and COM2_Running and MON1_Running and MON2_Running);' with 'eq Initializing : bool = not (COM1_Running and COM2_Running and MON1_Running and MON2_Running);'

In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L1 "COM1 Consistency" : COM1._CLK and not FailCOM1 => (COM1.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM1.Mode,Pedal));' with 'lemma L1 "COM1 Consistency" : COM1._CLK and not FailCOM1 => (COM1.CMD = Pedal);'

In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L2 "COM2 Consistency" : COM2._CLK and not FailCOM2 => (COM2.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM2.Mode,Pedal));' with 'lemma L2 "COM2 Consistency" : COM2._CLK and not FailCOM2 => (COM2.CMD = Pedal);'

In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L3 "MON1 Consistency" : MON1._CLK and not FailMON1 => (MON1.Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(MON1.Mode,Pedal));' with 'lemma L3 "MON1 Consistency" : MON1._CLK and not FailMON1 => (MON1.Status.Cmd = Pedal);'

In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L4 "MON2 Consistency" : MON2._CLK and not FailMON2 => (MON2.Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(MON2.Mode,Pedal));' with 'lemma L4 "MON2 Consistency" : MON2._CLK and not FailMON2 => (MON2.Status.Cmd = Pedal);'
In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L11 "CH1 Error Only if Failed" : CH1.Error => COM1Failed or MON1Failed;' with 'lemma L11 "CH1 Error Only if Failed" : CH1.Error => (FailCOM1 or FailMON1);'
In the BSCU.BSCU_Impl annex, replace 'lemma L12 "Ch2 Error Only if Failed" : CH2.Error => COM2Failed or MON2Failed;' with 'lemma L12 "Ch2 Error Only if Failed" : CH2.Error => (FailCOM2 or FailMON2);'
